title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS is a framework that equips AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and tested procedures to improve success rates. The toolkit provides agent skills as markdown runbooks, integrates via plugins and MCP config, and enables agents to deploy resources like Lambda functions behind API Gateway with reduced errors and improved auditability.
